achievements: Voice input feature (feat/voice-input): Full-stack implementation across 27 files — DB schema, WhisperService, Celery tasks, voice API, Telegram bot handler, VoiceRecorder React component, integrated into Journal/Notes/Search pages (14 commits, +3391 lines)
Pipeline remediation: Fixed NameError in recover_pending_documents that caused 100% failure for April 2-4 uploads; added backfill tasks for reprocessing failed docs and missing embeddings
Mintlify-inspired UI overhaul: Cmd+K search modal, CommandPalette, glassmorphism cards, Inter font typography, PrivacyBadge, dashed grid background
Auth middleware refactor: Eliminated backend HTTP call from auth middleware, fixed circular imports, aligned login redirects with locale config
Search reliability: Rewrote SSE event parser to match backend contract, improved short-query precision, fixed i18n null reference crashes
Navigation redesign: Replaced broken horizontal nav with vertical sidebar layout
improvements: Voice feature needs integration tests — only 4 unit tests exist for WhisperService; no E2E coverage for the upload→transcribe→display flow
whisper.cpp model download baked into Dockerfile.worker — consider lazy download or shared volume to avoid bloating every worker rebuild
VoiceRecorder.tsx at 233 lines — could benefit from extracting the recording UI state machine from the visual component
entity_extraction_service.py is modified but uncommitted on the current branch — risk of losing work or merge conflicts
CLAUDE.md still references '16GB VPS' but VPS was upgraded to 32GB on 2026-03-23 (per memory); should update to avoid confusion
Multiple extra compose files still exist (docker-compose.production.yml, docker-compose.simple.yml, docker-compose.prebuilt.yml) violating the one-compose-file rule in CLAUDE.md
next_tasks: Merge feat/voice-input to master — 14 commits ahead, code review fixes already applied (0659e29)
Run Alembic migration 021 on production for voice/audio schema (document audio columns + note_audio table)
Deploy updated worker image with whisper.cpp to production VPS — verify memory stays within container limits
Test Telegram voice note flow end-to-end: send voice → bot downloads → Whisper transcribes → journal entry created
Address the uncommitted entity_extraction_service.py change — either commit or stash before switching branches
Clean up untracked files (.agents/, audit scripts, embed_chunked_docs.py) — decide what to gitignore vs commit
risks: Worker memory: whisper.cpp + ggml-small model + multilingual-e5-large embeddings in the same Celery worker — risk exceeding 5632MB memory limit under concurrent load
No voice feature tests beyond WhisperService unit tests — regressions will be invisible until user-facing failures
14 uncommitted/untracked files in working tree including .secrets.baseline (modified) — potential for accidental secret exposure or lost work
Pipeline remediation (April 2-4 uploads) — verify all recovered documents actually completed processing; backfill tasks were added but success rate unconfirmed
Voice API has no rate limiting — audio uploads are expensive to process and could be abused to exhaust worker capacity
docker-compose.yml now mounts whisper model path — production VPS needs the model pre-downloaded at the expected path before deploy
